playbook.intent: Open interview slot -> ran on time + notes filed + follow-up scheduled.
playbook.scope: Researcher runs one participant interview. Includes pre-flight (env, consent, recording), running the interview, hot-take note within an hour, raw artifacts filed in the repo, and a follow-up either scheduled or politely closed. Done when notes are filed and the follow-up state is logged.

success-criteria.criterion: Hot-take note filed within 1 hour of interview end
Raw artifacts (recording + transcript) in the repo with consistent naming

stage.name: Pre-flight
stage.intent: Don't lose data to a flat battery.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only after recording + consent are confirmed.

stage.name: Open
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the participant looks comfortable.

stage.name: Probe JTBD + pain
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when critical incidents are described.

stage.name: Wrap

tasks.task: Ask the participant if anything was missed

stage.decision-gate: Advance when participant has consented to follow-up state.

stage.name: Hot take

tasks.task: Write a 5-min hot take while still fresh

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after note is written.

stage.name: File + follow-up

outputs.output: Raw artifacts filed + follow-up state logged

stage.decision-gate: Done when repo entry exists with all artifacts.

extra.value: ['Skipping pre-flight -> lose recording, lose data', No hot take -> details fade by next morning, Inconsistent naming -> repo becomes a junk drawer]
['Is the recording filed and named correctly?', 'Did I capture key quotes while fresh?', 'Is the follow-up state explicit?']

{human: faion get-content user-interview-prep-run-1-session --format md, agent: faion get-content user-interview-prep-run-1-session --format context, json: faion get-content user-interview-prep-run-1-session --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
